title: AutoLapis
description: Automatically moves lapis lazuli from your inventory into the enchanting table slot when you open it
body:
[![JOIN OUR DISCORD](https://img.shields.io/badge/JOIN%20OUR%20DISCORD-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE)

A simple Quality of Life mod that automatically fills the enchanting table lapis lazuli slot from your inventory the moment you open it. It saves you the hassle of manually dragging lapis every time you want to enchant, while keeping the vanilla closing behavior completely intact.

**What it does:**
- Automatically moves lapis lazuli from your inventory directly into the enchanting slot when you open the table.
- Fills the slot up to one maximum stack (64 lapis), seamlessly combining smaller stacks from your inventory if needed.
- Does nothing if you don't have any lapis, letting the menu behave normally.
- Returns the lapis back to your inventory exactly as usual when you close the table, preserving predictable vanilla mechanics.

**Two versions are available:**
- **Server version** — install on the server; clients may join without the mod.
- **Client-only version** — install on the client; works even on servers that do not have the mod installed.

For singleplayer you can use any version. Just install it normally in your mods folder.

**Please report any bugs, errors, or feature suggestions on Discord:** [https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE](https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE)
